channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Prediction markets entering institutional era after first block trade — Bernstein
item.description: Institutional investors are entering prediction markets as block trades, custom contracts and US regulatory shifts reshape a sector still dominated by retail users.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Ethereum holders are back in profit as ETH price chart targets $3K
item.description: Ethereum investors are no longer in the red, increasing the chances of a rally to $3,000, but resistance at $2,800 may delay recovery.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: SEC delays prediction market ETFs over mechanics and risk concerns: Report
item.description: The regulator reportedly requested more information from Roundhill, GraniteShares and Bitwise about how the event contract funds would work.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: K Wave Media abandons Bitcoin treasury push for AI infrastructure
item.description: K Wave Media is redirecting up to $485 million from a Bitcoin treasury strategy into AI infrastructure, alongside debt reduction and restructuring, per a Form 6-K filing.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: ZIGChain Summit 2026 marks a defining moment for onchain finance as ecosystem unites around execution, partnerships
item.description: ZIGChain, the blockchain built to bring regulated investment products onchain for everyday users, today reflected on its second annual ZIGChain Summit, a defining gathering for the future of onchain finance, held on 28 April at the The Meydan Hotel, Dubai.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Hut 8 refinances Bitcoin-backed loan with $200M FalconX deal
item.description: The Bitcoin miner said the FalconX facility lowers its fixed interest rate to 7% and releases about 3,300 BTC from collateral restrictions.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bitcoin in ‘disbelief rally’ as traders spot $84K BTC price target
item.description: Bitcoin’s rally on Monday pushed it above $80,000 for the first time since January as analysts say BTC price could rise further to fill the futures gap at $84,000 in the short term.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Bitcoin price eyes $96K as institutions absorb 500% of daily BTC supply
item.description: In past instances, BTC has averaged 24% gains in one month when institutional demand absorbed over 500% of the daily mined supply.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: South Korea crypto sector warns AML proposal goes too far: Report
item.description: Crypto industry body DAXA said the proposed rules could push suspicious transaction reports from South Korea’s five largest exchanges to more than 5.4 million a year, Yonhap reported.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: BTC price can ‘easily’ hit $95K: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin gained fresh bullish BTC price targets after hitting new three-month highs above $80,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: GameStop makes $55.5B offer to buy eBay in surprise takeover bid
item.description: GameStop proposes a $55.5 billion cash-and-stock takeover of eBay, disclosing a 5% stake and says CEO Ryan Cohen would lead the combined company.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Capital B raises $1.3M from Adam Back for Bitcoin strategy
item.description: The Blockstream CEO subscribed to 10 million warrants as Capital B pushes ahead with its Bitcoin treasury strategy.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: US law firm attempts to block transfer of frozen ETH from Kelp exploit
item.description: Gerstein Harrow has filed similar cases in the past, arguing its clients have a claim to funds stolen by the DPRK and frozen by crypto firms.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Bitcoin climbs past $80K for the first time since January
item.description: Bitcoin soared as the MSCI AC Asia Index rose to a new high on Monday, an early indicator that investors viewed the weekend developments in a reasonably positive light.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: CFTC sees mixed responses to prediction market rulemaking
item.description: The CFTC received more than 1,500 responses to its prediction market rulemaking proposal, with respondents divided on how it should police the platforms.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: ‘Stablecoins’ are an outdated term from crypto’s early years: A16z
item.description: John Palmer, a developer and brand adviser, agreed, said it "feels like a bug" to call them stablecoins and that they should have a self-defined and non-reactionary name.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Stablecoin firms have a $112B additional opportunity in LATAM remittance
item.description: The US-to-Mexico remittance corridor, while still the largest, shrank 4.5% in 2025 as other Latin American corridors grew.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Strategy takes Bitcoin buying breather ahead of Q1 earnings report
item.description: Michael Saylor signaled a “pause” on BTC buying ahead of Tuesday’s earnings report, with Wall Street expecting a loss for Q1.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Bitcoin preps highest weekly close since January as BTC price nears $79K
item.description: Bitcoin canceled out the week's earlier losses to tease the highest weekly BTC price candle close since the end of January near $79,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Americans distrust crypto, AI as industry super PACs flood midterms, poll finds
item.description: A new Politico poll finds most Americans distrust crypto and AI, raising questions about whether candidates backed by industry super PACs could face voter backlash.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Iran’s largest crypto exchange founded by sons of family tied to supreme leaders: Reuters
item.description: Nobitex, Iran’s largest crypto exchange, was founded by brothers linked to the powerful Kharrazi family, which has ties to the country’s supreme leaders.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: US CISA adds ‘insane’ Linux Copy Fail flaw to watch list
item.description: Malicious actors with code execution capability may gain root access on Linux systems using as few as 10 lines of Python, according to a researcher.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ciaran Lyons

item.title: New York forces Uphold to pay $5M over fraudulent crypto investment scheme
item.description: New York AG Letitia James secured a $5 million settlement from Uphold for promoting CredEarn, a crypto savings product that misled users about its risks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Crypto industry will be ‘just fine’ if CLARITY Act doesn’t pass: Chris Perkins
item.description: The efforts of the SEC and CFTC chairs indicate that the crypto industry will not suffer without the CLARITY Act, according to crypto executive Chris Perkins.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ciaran Lyons

item.title: Bitcoin logs best monthly performance in 12 months during April
item.description: Despite being the best-performing month in the past 12 months, Bitcoin still came in slightly below its historical average, according to CoinGlass data.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ciaran Lyons

item.title: Wallets seized by OFAC may not be Iranian; other state actors instead: Analyst
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said that wallets the US targeted as part of Operation Economic Fury were linked to Tehran, but analysis of the wallets' characteristics suggests otherwise.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: A16z sides with CFTC against states seeking to ban prediction markets
item.description: Venture capital firm a16z argues that state crackdowns on platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket conflict with federal law and hurt market access for ordinary users.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Riot posts $167M in Q1 revenue as data center arm pulls in $33M in first quarter
item.description: Riot Platforms reported $167.2 million in Q1 2026 revenue, with its new data center business contributing $33.2 million as Bitcoin mining income fell.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Ethereum Foundation sells another 10,000 ETH to BitMine in third OTC deal
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation has now sold roughly $47 million worth of ETH to BitMine in a week, drawing fresh criticism over the pace and scale of its sales.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas
